---
title: "ResolveKit Android SDK"
---
ResolveKit Android SDK - Embedded AI resolution framework for Android.

Key files:
- README.md: Integration guide and API reference
- CHANGELOG.md: Version history
- ui/src/main/kotlin/app/resolvekit/ui/ResolveKitConfiguration.kt: Configuration
- ui/src/main/kotlin/app/resolvekit/ui/ResolveKitRuntime.kt: Main runtime
- authoring/src/main/kotlin/app/resolvekit/authoring/ResolveKit.kt: @ResolveKit annotation

Quick start: Add Gradle dependency, use @ResolveKit annotation on functions, present ResolveKitChat composable.
Requires: Android 8.0 (API 26)+, Kotlin 1.9.22, Compose BOM 2024.02.00
